title: Make a cache tenant-safe
description: Rework a cache so keys and invalidation include the tenant, preventing one tenant from receiving another's cached data.
body: Use when a cache serves tenant-scoped data with a tenant-blind key. Do not leave the tenant out of the key. Actions: compose the cache key with the resolved tenant id; ensure invalidation targets the tenant's entries; verify no shared key can collide across tenants. Validation signals include a test confirming tenant A's value is never returned to tenant B for the same logical key. Risk boundary: a tenant-blind cache leaks data across tenants, so treat the fix as a leak remediation and add a regression test that locks in the tenant-keyed behavior.
